🤖 Inbuilt AI Optimizer & Parameter Tuning ACTIVE

Learns from local trade retrospectives to formulate filters that suppress false signals (low-conviction whipsaws).

🤖
Inbuilt Intelligence Optimizer Active: Dynamically analyzing and optimizing parameters based on 608 EOD retrospective trials. Recommendations are updated daily on market close to filter out historical whipsaws and increase the alert success rate.

⚡ Active Filter Rules & Recommendations

Alert Type

BULLISH CROSSOVER

+14.5% Win Rate (Expert Estimate)
Filter Name: Volume & RSI Confirmation
Ensures strong volume support and avoids buying at extreme overbought levels.
Active Check Volume Ratio >= 1.0 and RSI < 65
EOD Target Metric Filters out ~30% of high-risk signals
Alert Type

BEARISH CROSSOVER

+12.0% Win Rate (Expert Estimate)
Filter Name: RSI & PCR Confirmation
Avoids shorting at oversold zones and ensures option interest supports bearish movement.
Active Check RSI > 35 and PCR <= 1.1
EOD Target Metric Filters out ~25% of false breakdowns
Alert Type

VOLUME DRYUP

+18.0% Win Rate (Expert Estimate)
Filter Name: Compression Squeeze Validation
Validates that volume is extremely low and price is in equilibrium before a breakout.
Active Check Volume Ratio < 0.45 and RSI between 40 and 60
EOD Target Metric Improves breakout conviction
Alert Type

MACD INCREASE

0.9% → 3.4% Win Rate (+2.5%)
Filter Name: Optimized Option PCR >= 0.8
Ensures bullish options positioning prior to entry.
Active Check Option PCR >= 0.8
EOD Target Metric Prevents 81 low-conviction signals
Alert Type

MOMENTUM START

+13.0% Win Rate (Expert Estimate)
Filter Name: Trend Momentum Confirmation
Ensures momentum is backed by volume and does not trigger in a flat range.
Active Check Volume Ratio >= 1.1 and RSI > 45
EOD Target Metric Avoids weak breakout traps
Alert Type

HISTOGRAM ACCELERATING

+15.0% Win Rate (Expert Estimate)
Filter Name: Histogram Thrust Confirmation
Confirms histogram momentum is supported by real traded volume.
Active Check Volume Ratio >= 1.2 and Histogram > 0.1
EOD Target Metric Filters out false breakouts

❓ How it works

1. Data Collection: Every day after 3:30 PM market close, the EOD Retrospective checks how signals performed and saves the outcome (SUCCESS/FAILED/NEUTRAL) in the database.

2. Optimization Engine: The optimizer joins these outcomes with the indicator values (RSI, PCR, Volume, Futures OI) captured at the exact moment of the trigger.

3. Parameter Tuning: It tests multiple logical filters (e.g., volume ratio floor, RSI ceilings, PCR ranges) to see if applying them would have filtered out historical losses while keeping winning trades.

4. Conviction Downgrading: If "Enable Adaptive AI Filtering" is toggled in the configurations, future signals that fail these rules are flagged as LOW CONVICTION.

💡 Direct Benefit: This allows you to completely filter out low-liquidity spikes or overbought momentum exhaustion traps dynamically, optimizing your win rate without manually tweaking code configurations.

🎯 Symbol-Specific Performance Profiles

Custom parameter thresholds learned by the AI for individual stocks based on their unique volatility and liquidity behaviors.

Symbol Alert Type Custom Rule Condition Success Rate Impact Trials
NSE:NIFTY MACD INCREASE RSI < 60 25.0% → 33.3% Win Rate (+8.3%) 4

⚙️ System Configurations

Modify the operational parameters of the tracking daemon. Changes are applied dynamically on the next poll.

🔊 Audible Alerts Settings

Enable sound alerts and customize how they beep for different indicators.

Customize Signal Tones

📋 Dashboard Column Visibility

Toggle the columns you want to display on the live snapshot and volume dry-up dashboards.
